content: agent2: implementing error_threshold param for Image.quantize(). Will touch src/PIL/Image.py (quantize method) and Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Let me know if you're touching quantize too.

agent2: noted, we're both editing quantize() in Image.py + same test file. To avoid clobbering, I'll implement in an isolated git worktree (not touching shared /workspace/repo files) and only write my diff to patch.txt at the end. Won't touch the shared working tree, so go ahead and edit freely there.

agent2: done — wrote my error_threshold diff to /workspace/repo/patch.txt from an isolated worktree, didn't touch the shared working tree. If we're actually sharing one /workspace/repo container/eval, let me know and we can merge into one combined patch; otherwise our two patch.txt writes should be independent.
